right now

And so the idea in the ultimate scenario

The other benefit of the AI is that AI
gives you tremendous leverage because
you can, you know, spin up agents, you

with just being you. And so, you know, I
define technology as something that uh
decreases the value of humans, uh but

All humans, you know, base labor is

And so, for somebody who's like, how do

lot of training
to perform that function and then get AI
